zh.Altyre House, Morayshire, Scotland, Unit: 英國蘇格蘭莫雷阿爾爾 豪斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Comyn of Altyre於大約1375年出生在英國蘇格蘭莫雷阿爾爾 豪斯時，他的父親Ferquhard Cumming of Altyr de Comyn33歲，母親Janet Cameron28歲。他於1401年與Lady Margaret Gordon在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1419年在英國蘇格蘭莫雷享年45歲。

zh-hans.Altyre House, Morayshire, Scotland, Unit: 英国苏格兰莫雷阿爾爾 豪斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Comyn of Altyre于大约1375年出生在英国苏格兰莫雷阿爾爾 豪斯时，他的父亲Ferquhard Cumming of Altyr de Comyn33岁，母亲Janet Cameron28岁。他于1401年与Lady Margaret Gordon在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1419年在英国苏格兰莫雷享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Comyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cumming
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): most probably a habitational name from Bosc-Benard-Commin in Eure, France. This place lies on the edge of the Forêt de Rouvray, near Rouen, in the heart of the district from which came numerous Domesday barons, and so is much more likely to be the source of the name than Comines in Nord. The name is also possibly derived from the personal name Cumin, which is found in Norfolk, Lincolnshire, and Yorkshire in the 12th and 13th centuries and may be of Breton origin, according to Reaney. Compare Old Breton Cunmin, which also appears as Cumin, and is from con- ‘hound’ with an uncertain second element, perhaps the min ‘edge’ which is found in other personal names.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cuimín (or Ó Cuimín) ‘son (or ‘descendant’) of Cuimín’, a personal name formed from a diminutive of cam ‘crooked’. There was a 7th-century abbot of Iona named Cumin. In Scotland, this Irish surname became confused with the Norman name.

History: A notable bearer of the Norman surname is Wilhelmus Comyn, Bishop of Durham, who came north to Scotland with King David I in 1124 and was appointed Chancellor of Scotland. He established his nephew Richard in Tynedale and Roxburghshire, and Richard also rose to be Chancellor of Scotland. The Comyn or Cumming family gained the earldoms of Buchan and Menteith and rose to be the most powerful noble family in Scotland in the century before the rise of King Robert Bruce.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Comyn of Altyre was born about 1375, in Altyre House, Moray, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Ferquhard Cumming of Altyr de Comyn, was 33 and his mother, Janet Cameron, was 28. He married Lady Margaret Gordon in 1401, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1419, in Moray, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Comyn of Altyre est né environ 1375, à Altyre House, Moray, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ferquhard Cumming of Altyr de Comyn, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Janet Cameron, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Gordon en 1401, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1419, à Moray, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.Altyre House, Morayshire, Scotland, Unit: Altyre House, Moray, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Comyn of Altyre um 1375 in Altyre House, Moray, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ferquhard Cumming of Altyr de Comyn 33 und seine Mutter Janet Cameron 28. Er hat 1401 in Aberdeenshire, Scotland Lady Margaret Gordon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1419 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Moray, Schottland, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Comyn of Altyreが約1375年にイギリススコットランドモーアイアルトイア ホーウゼで生まれた時，父Ferquhard Cumming of Altyr de Comynは33歳，母Janet Cameronは28歳であった。1401年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアでLady Margaret Gordonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1419年にイギリススコットランドモーアイで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Comyn of Altyre(이)가 대략 1375년 영국 스코틀랜드 모라이 알티어 허스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ferquhard Cumming of Altyr de Comyn(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Janet Cameron(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1401년 스컷랜드 압르디실르에서 Lady Margaret Gordon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1419년 영국 스코틀랜드 모라이에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Comyn of Altyre родился около 1375 г. в местности алтир хоус, мореи, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ferquhard Cumming of Altyr de Comyn было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Janet Cameron, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Gordon в 1401 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1419 г. в местности мореи, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.
